home.faqSubtitle: The most important answers before you start or upgrade
home.faq1Question: ❓ How much can I really earn?
home.faq1Answer: It depends heavily on niche, reach, content quality, and execution discipline. The platform helps you produce content faster, track clicks, and work on monetization more systematically.
home.faq2Answer: Yes. You can start free, test initial content, and learn the workflow. Only when you need more volume, automation, and reports do you switch to Pro for EUR 39 per month.
home.faq3Question: 🤖 How good is the AI Content Factory?
home.faq3Answer: It speeds up topic finding, structure, and first drafts significantly. The best results come when you review the generated content editorially and adapt it to your audience.
home.faq4Answer: You place relevant recommendations in your content and can track clicks. Actual compensation depends on the partner program, and not every click leads to revenue automatically.
home.faq5Answer: The entry is easy, but good newsletters still rely on clear content and clean segmentation. Automation mainly saves you routine work.
home.faq6Answer: There are technical protection mechanisms for infrastructure and data access. Like any online system, you should also use strong credentials and clean processes.
home.faqFooterSubtitle: If anything is still unclear, you can first look at the free version or contact us directly.
